agility_desc: Agility increases critical hit chance and damage return
cores_desc: Cores increase the maximum number of operations executable per turn. One core adds 1 million to the maximum number of operations.
frequency_desc: Entities with higher frequency are more likely to start the fight first
life_desc: How much damage an entity can take before it dies
magic_desc: Magic increases shackles and poison damage
mp_desc: How many cells you can move across during a turn
ram_desc: One unit of RAM provides 1 chip slot and a million variables usable by the AI
science_desc: Science increases boosts and nova damage
strength_desc: Strength increases the damage dealt by your weapons and chips.
too_high: This characteristic is useful from level {0} onwards.
tp_desc: Maximum number of actions during a turn
wisdom_desc: Wisdom increases healing and life steal
